channel.title: Optional Rules on DD20 SRD
channel.description: Recent content in Optional Rules on DD20 SRD

item.title: Modifiers
item.description:
Modifiers

The GM can incorporate any of the following rules adjustments to suit their campaign:

  • Death Roll: When a character would become OUT in a context where they might die, the GM can call for a death roll. The player must roll a D20 with no bonus. If they roll a 1, their character dies. If they roll a 20, they recover one stress. If they roll anything else, they become OUT normally.

item.title: Side Sheets
item.description:
Side Sheets

If the narrative includes an entity such as a character, pet, sidekick, or organization that is important enough to warrant its own character sheet, then the GM can choose to create a side sheet for that entity.

Side sheets are character sheets that do use stress or have their own experience points. When creating a side sheet, determine which players are its owners. The side sheet’s owners can control the entity, roleplay as it, decide its actions, and make rolls with it.
